character.name: Fire Emblem GBA style chibi
character.prompt:
Fire Emblem GBA style chibi female battle mage, western fantasy,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions,
large head with big expressive eyes, short body, small hands and feet,
long silver hair flowing from full scalp down past shoulders to chest level,
hair bangs across forehead, head completely bare and uncovered,
wearing white and blue robe with gold trim and ornate silver chest armor,
separate blue cloak draped from shoulders down to knees behind body,
loose hood fabric resting flat against upper back behind the neck,
hood is detached accessory hanging down, never covering head or hair,
wooden staff with large blue crystal orb held in right hand,
brown leather belt with pouches at waist,
young woman early 20s, gentle confident pose,
clean pixel art, vibrant colors, sharp silhouette
